name: erc-mandated-execution
description: TypeScript SDK and MCP server workspace for ERC-8192 mandated execution workflows.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @erc-mandated/sdk run build && npm --workspace @erc-mandated/mcp run build
scripts.test: npm --workspace @erc-mandated/sdk run test && npm --workspace @erc-mandated/mcp run test
